mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, app_name, app_desc, app_icon, `status`, flags, creator_id, creator_name, creator_dept_id, creator_dept_name, creator_org_id, creator_org_name, app_key, sort_score
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_admin_app (gmt_create, gmt_modified, app_name, app_desc, app_icon, `status`, flags, creator_id, creator_name, creator_dept_id, creator_dept_name, creator_org_id, creator_org_name, app_key, sort_score) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appIcon,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortScore,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update: update t_wf_admin_app set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, app_name = #{appName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_desc = #{appDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_icon = #{appIcon,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_name = #{creatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_dept_id = #{creatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_dept_name = #{creatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_org_id = #{creatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_org_name = #{creatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_score = #{sortScore,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_admin_app (gmt_create, gmt_modified, app_name, app_desc, app_icon, `status`, flags, creator_id, creator_name, creator_dept_id, creator_dept_name, creator_org_id, creator_org_name, app_key,sort_score) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.appName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appIcon,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sortScore,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: select id from t_wf_admin_app where app_key=#{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
select id, app_name, app_desc, app_icon,app_key from t_wf_admin_app where app_key=#{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
